ns0:entry.ns0:title: DaveGamble/cJSON
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DaveGamble/cJSON
Language: c
Ultralightweight JSON parser in ANSI C

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Genymobile/scrcpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy
Language: c
Display and control your Android device

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
Language: c
NVIDIA Linux open GPU kernel module source

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: darktable-org/darktable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darktable-org/darktable
Language: c
darktable is an open source photography workflow application and raw developer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eclipse-mosquitto/mosquitto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eclipse-mosquitto/mosquitto
Language: c
Eclipse Mosquitto - An open source MQTT broker

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jqlang/jq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jqlang/jq
Language: c
Command-line JSON processor

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kingToolbox/WindTerm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kingToolbox/WindTerm
Language: c
A professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Shell/Telnet/Tmux/Serial terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: micropython/micropython
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/micropython/micropython
Language: c
MicroPython - a lean and efficient Python implementation for microcontrollers and constrained systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwrt/openwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
Language: c
This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins. We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: php/php-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/php/php-src
Language: c
The PHP Interpreter

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
Language: c
Scripts which perform an installable binary image build for SONiC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: systemd/systemd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/systemd/systemd
Language: c
The systemd System and Service Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ventoy/Ventoy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ventoy/Ventoy
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ https://windows-internals.com
